name: Butter Toffee
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Milk chocolate, broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 15x10-inch jelly roll pan; set aside.
2. Combine sugar, salt, water, and butter in a heavy 3-quart saucepan.
3. Heat to boiling on medium-high heat.
4. Add 3/4 cup chopped blanched almonds and cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture reaches a hard crack stage (300-310 degrees).
5. Remove from heat. Stir in the remaining 3/4 cup chopped blanched almonds, 1/2 cup finely chopped walnuts, and rum extract.
6. Quickly pour into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
7. Place chocolate pieces on top of the toffee until melted.
8. Spread the melted chocolate evenly over the toffee.
9. Sprinkle with the remaining 1/2 cup finely chopped walnuts.
10. Cool; break into pieces.
Makes: 50 pieces
